channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Supreme Court strengthens Trump's authority over independent agencies
item.description: The court overturned a 91-year-old precedent that protected members of independent agencies from presidential removal.

item.title: Supreme Court allows Fed's Lisa Cook to remain in role for now
item.description: The ruling permits Cook to stay in her position while her dismissal challenge proceeds in lower courts.

item.title: Supreme Court upholds mail-in ballot grace periods, ruling against GOP
item.description: The Supreme Court ruled to uphold a Mississippi law allowing mail-in ballots postmarked by Election Day to be counted.

item.title: Supreme Court limits use of geofence warrants
item.description: In a 6-3 decision, Justice Elena Kagan wrote that geofencing violates the Fourth Amendment's ban on unreasonable searches.
